# UIAO Metadata Migration Review Checklist

This PR contains automated metadata migrations generated by migrate_uiao_metadata.js.
Reviewers must confirm correctness, provenance, and governance alignment before merge.

---

## 1. Structural Validation

- [ ] All modified files contain valid frontmatter.
- [ ] Required fields (id, title, owner, status, etc.) are present.
- [ ] No deprecated fields remain.
- [ ] No new undocumented fields were introduced.

## 2. ID and Mapping Integrity

- [ ] All generated IDs follow canonical format.
- [ ] No collisions or duplicates across corpus.
- [ ] Cross-references (links, appendix references, owner mappings) resolve correctly.

## 3. Content Drift Check

- [ ] Migration did not alter narrative content.
- [ ] Only metadata blocks changed.
- [ ] No accidental whitespace or formatting drift.

## 4. Link and Reference Validation

- [ ] All internal links resolve.
- [ ] Appendix references remain correct.
- [ ] No broken relative paths introduced.

## 5. Governance and Provenance

- [ ] Migration notes included in PR description.
- [ ] Script version and parameters documented.
- [ ] Reviewer acknowledges this PR as the canonical migration for this batch.

---

### Branch Naming Convention

`migrate/metadata/<batch-id>-<scope>`

Examples:
- `migrate/metadata/batch-001-frontmatter`
- `migrate/metadata/batch-002-appendix-alignment`

### Commit Message Convention

```
chore: automated UIAO metadata migration (batch <N>)

Applies canonical migration using scripts/migrate_uiao_metadata.js.
- Normalization of required frontmatter fields
- ID generation and collision resolution
- Removal of deprecated metadata keys
- Alignment with governance schema vNEXT
- No narrative content changes

Provenance:
- Script version: <version>
- Execution context: controlled batch migration
- Review required by Docs Ops, Appendix Owners, and Governance
```

---

### Reviewer Sign-off

- Docs Ops:
- Appendix Owner(s):
- Governance Reviewer:

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
